name: jingle-machine
description: Project-level orchestration only (no app code). The downloadable installers are the COMPLETE app (client + Mixer), so fetching them is a project-level concern, not a server one.
//packages: References to the two independent sub-packages, for clarity. NOT npm/yarn workspaces on purpose: client/ uses npm and server/ uses Yarn 4 — keeping them separate avoids a shared lockfile/linker. Run each package's commands from inside its own folder.

client.role: Angular webapp (UI). Built and bundled into the desktop app, and deployed standalone to GitHub Pages (without YouTube).

server.role: Electron desktop app + local Mixer (yt-dlp/ffmpeg). Packages the COMPLETE installer (embeds the built client/) via electron-builder.
